messages.content: Under which Path is Dominicus listed?
Harmony.
Which Path section includes Dominicus among Harmonic Strings?
Harmony.
Is Dominicus listed under Preservation?
No. Dominicus is listed under Harmony.
Dominicus belongs to Harmony or Erudition?
Harmony.
Correct this statement: Dominicus is listed under Nihility.
Incorrect. Dominicus is listed under Harmony.
Under which Path is Wingperor listed?
Abundance.
Which Path includes Wingperor among Denizens of Abundance?
Abundance.
Is Wingperor listed under The Hunt?
No. Wingperor is listed under Abundance.
Wingperor belongs to Abundance or Destruction?
Abundance.
Fix this claim: Wingperor is listed under Harmony.
Incorrect. Wingperor is listed under Abundance.
Under which Path is Zulo listed?
Destruction.
Which Path section names Zulo among Lord Ravagers?
Destruction.
Is Zulo listed under Remembrance?
No. Zulo is listed under Destruction.
Zulo belongs to Destruction or Elation?
Destruction.
Correct this statement: Zulo is listed under Preservation.
Incorrect. Zulo is listed under Destruction.
